title: artemisia obtusiloba subsp. altaiensis
intro: Artemisia obtusiloba subsp. altaiensis is a subspecies of the artemisia obtusiloba plant, a type of wormwood native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Artemisia obtusiloba subsp. altaiensis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
